name: Makyura the Destructor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>処</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－マキュラ
desc: If this card is sent from the Monster Zone to the GY: You can activate 1 Trap Card from your hand this turn. You can only use this effect of "Makyura the Destructor" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent from the Monster Zone to the GY: You can activate 1 Trap Card from your hand this turn. You can only use this effect of "Makyura the Destructor" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent from the Monster Zone to the GY: You can activate 1 Trap Card from your hand this turn. You can only use this effect of "Makyura the Destructor" once per turn.
